evidence.details: Nmap done: 256 IP addresses (5 hosts up) scanned in 25.47 seconds

summary: Bounded reconnaissance established multiple reachable in-scope hosts within 10.20.0.0/24.

evidence.details: 10.20.0.1 Host is up; 111/tcp open rpcbind 2-4 (RPC #100000); 8000/tcp filtered http-alt

summary: 10.20.0.1 is reachable with 111/tcp open running rpcbind; same host showed 8000/tcp filtered as negative port-state evidence.

evidence.details: 10.20.0.10 Host is up; 8080/tcp open http Jetty 9.2.11.v20150529

summary: 10.20.0.10 is reachable with web service on 8080/tcp identified as Jetty 9.2.11.v20150529.

evidence.details: 10.20.0.11 Host is up; 80/tcp open http Apache httpd 2.4.25 ((Debian))

summary: 10.20.0.11 is reachable with web service on 80/tcp identified as Apache httpd 2.4.25 ((Debian)).

evidence.details: 10.20.0.50 Host is up; 2222/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 10.2 (protocol 2.0)

summary: 10.20.0.50 is reachable with SSH on 2222/tcp identified as OpenSSH 10.2.

evidence.details: 10.20.0.3 Host is up; 8000/tcp open http Uvicorn

summary: 10.20.0.3 is reachable with web service on 8000/tcp identified as Uvicorn.

description: 对 http://10.20.0.10:8080/ 的页面指纹显示标题为“Struts2 Showcase - Fileupload sample”，服务器头为 Jetty(9.2.11.v20150529)，HTTP 200。该结果将原先的‘Jetty 9.2.11’通用容器指纹提升为更具体的应用级特征：疑似 Apache Struts2 Showcase 示例应用，且暴露文件上传示例页面。
title: Improved fingerprint: 10.20.0.10:8080 appears to host an Apache Struts2 Showcase application on Jetty

description: 应用标题直接包含 Struts2 Showcase/Fileupload sample，说明该目标存在与 Struts2 相关的可验证攻击面。但当前 vuln_profile_match 未返回可直接套用的已注册验证配置，因此不能据此声称存在具体 CVE 或已确认漏洞。可将其作为优先候选目标，由后续阶段执行额外路径发现、版本归因或受控安全验证。
title: Candidate validation path: Struts2-associated attack surface on 10.20.0.10:8080 warrants bounded safe validation planning

analysis: 该服务当前可确认是可访问的 Debian Apache Web 服务，但没有标题、框架标识、登录入口、已知路径命中或其他可支持候选漏洞匹配的应用层特征。仅凭版本和服务头，不应声明存在漏洞。
evidence: recon 已识别 10.20.0.11:80 为 Apache httpd 2.4.25 ((Debian))
stage_memory 中 web_fingerprint 结果显示 http://10.20.0.11/ 返回 200
页面 title 为 null，当前缺少可归因到具体应用/组件的证据
title: 10.20.0.11:80 指纹得到补强但未形成漏洞证据

analysis: 该目标具备最强的应用层特征，且暴露的是 Struts2 Showcase 文件上传示例页面，说明存在明确框架与功能面。但工具侧尚未提供匹配的 bounded validation profile，因此当前只能将其视为高价值候选面，不能据此直接确认漏洞。
evidence: 既有 finding: 10.20.0.10:8080 identified as Jetty 9.2.11.v20150529
既有 web_fingerprint: title 为 Struts2 Showcase - Fileupload sample
既有 finding: appears to host an Apache Struts2 Showcase application on Jetty
两次 vuln_profile_match 输出均为 []
title: 10.20.0.10:8080 仍是最具证据支撑的候选后续目标

analysis: 在未拿到可用 profile_id 之前，validation_precheck / safe_vuln_validate 缺乏明确目标画像。继续对 HTTP 服务做受限路径发现最能提升证据质量，同时保持合规与低风险。
evidence: vuln_profile_match 未给出 profile_id，exploit_validation 阶段未形成 finding
title: 当前最稳妥的下一步是继续低风险 HTTP 特征化，而非宣称漏洞存在

basis: Web fingerprint identified title 'Struts2 Showcase - Fileupload sample' at http://10.20.0.10:8080/
Prior bounded validation attempts via vuln_profile_match returned no matching safe validation profile
Without a profile_id, validation_precheck and safe_vuln_validate cannot be used within the bounded non-destructive workflow
candidate: Struts2-associated web vulnerability exposure on Apache Struts2 Showcase application
